headline: AMD Linux Push With CIQ Adds New Angle To AI Investment Story
summary: AMD and CIQ have introduced an open source, AMD optimized Rocky Linux distribution tailored for AI and high performance computing workloads. The release targets data centers using AMD CPUs, Instinct GPUs and the ROCm software platform, with a focus on enterprise grade validation and lifecycle support. The new Linux offering is available at no cost, aiming to simplify deployment and management for organizations standardizing on AMD based infrastructures. For investors tracking Advanced Micro...

headline: SK Hynix Takes AI Ambitions to Wall Street with Potential $14 Billion U.S. Listing
summary: South Korean chipmaker SK Hynix said it has filed confidentially for a U.S. listing that could raise up to $14 billion. The company aims to list about 2% to 3% of its shares in the second half of 2026, although the final size and timing are still under review. The planned listing comes as SK Hynix ramps up investment to meet strong demand for AI data center chips. The company said the proceeds will help fund new chip plants in South Korea and the U.S., including a major project in Indiana. At th

headline: Intel vs AMD: Which is a Better Long-Term Buy?
summary: Intel (NASDAQ:INTC) and Advanced Micro Devices (NASDAQ:AMD) both closed fiscal year 2025 with Q4 earnings that tell very different stories. Intel is fighting to rebuild credibility around its manufacturing ambitions and AI positioning while AMD is executing at pace, turning a once-niche challenger into a genuine data center powerhouse. Two Chipmakers, Two Very Different Quarters ... Intel vs AMD: Which is a Better Long-Term Buy?

headline: Chip Security Bill Advances in House Following Super Micro Case
